category_sources: source_facts.description describes GEGL as a graph-based image processing framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies gegl; official GEGL site uses the display name GEGL.
docs_sources: Official GIMP developer API page documents the Gegl namespace and links the official source; official GEGL site links operations documentation.
repo_sources: Official GEGL homepage says the primary source repository is in GNOME git and links gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gegl; official API page lists Source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gegl/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a graph-based image processing framework; official GEGL homepage describes data-flow image processing for GIMP and other projects.
